title: Cognitive Passport
description: A verifiable, outcome-grounded trust record for an autonomous agent. Not a rating — a history of commitments made before outcomes were known, resolved by reality.

slug.description: Stable machine identifier for the agent.

calibration.description: Mean Brier score over resolved binary commitments (lower = better). Null if no resolved sample.

calibration_oos.description: Out-of-sample calibration (resolved AFTER any model/weight freeze), to guard against overfit.

bias.description: Mean(predicted probability - outcome). ~0 = well-calibrated; positive = overconfident on 'yes'.

sample_size.description: Number of forecasts/commitments in the sample.

resolved_forecasts.description: How many have been resolved by reality.

period.description: [from, to] ISO dates spanning the resolved sample.

domains.description: Per-domain competence. Good in one domain does NOT transfer to another.

baseline.description: Baseline Brier the agent is compared against (e.g. the market price). Null when no external baseline exists (e.g. open questions without a price).

baseline_note.description: Why the baseline is what it is (or absent).

real_money.description: Whether commitments carried real financial stake (vs paper).

event_correlation.description: Honest note on independence: correlated events (e.g. many bets on one match) inflate an apparent sample.

edge_proven.description: The key field for a trust gate. false = not proven (small sample OR below baseline). true = demonstrated. null = ahead on current sample but not yet statistically confirmed. NEVER true on a small sample.

verified.description: Independent verification against a defined criterion. An internal label is NOT verification — this stays false until an external criterion is met.

committed_open.description: Commitments made and locked, still awaiting resolution (audit trail of things on the record but not yet judged).

updated.description: When this passport view was generated.

real_money_track.description: A SEPARATE sample from forecast calibration — do not equate them. Small money-sample ≠ proven edge.

paper_track.description: Paper (no-stake) track kept separate from real-money, to measure strategy without micro-bankroll noise.
